name: One Way Cab
shortDesc: Affordable one-way cab service from Ranchi. Pay only for one side — no return fare.
metaTitle: One Way Cab Service from Ranchi | Drop Taxi at Best Price
metaDesc: Book one-way cab from Ranchi to any city in Jharkhand, Bihar, West Bengal, Odisha at cheapest fare. Pay only for one side. Call +91 7488341848.
h1: One Way Cab Service from Ranchi — Best Drop Taxi Rates
content:
Looking for a reliable one-way cab service from Ranchi? Car Rental Ranchi offers the most affordable one-way drop taxi service from Ranchi to all major cities across Jharkhand and neighboring states including Bihar, West Bengal, Odisha, and Uttar Pradesh.

## Why Choose Our One Way Cab Service?

Traditionally, cab services charged passengers for the round trip even when they only needed a one-way drop. This meant paying double the fare for half the journey. At Car Rental Ranchi, we've changed this unfair practice. Our one-way cab service means you pay only for the distance you travel — no return charges, no hidden fees.

### Benefits of Our One Way Drop Taxi

- **Pay Only for One Side**: Unlike traditional taxi services that charge round-trip fares, our one-way pricing ensures you only pay for the distance traveled.
- **Transparent Pricing**: Our per-kilometer rates are clearly displayed with no hidden charges. What you see is what you pay.
- **Professional Drivers**: All our drivers are experienced, verified, and know the routes like the back of their hand.
- **Multiple Vehicle Options**: Choose from Swift Dzire, Toyota Etios, Innova, Innova Crysta, Ertiga, Scorpio, and more.
- **24/7 Availability**: Book your one-way cab anytime — early morning, late night, or during holidays.
- **Door-to-Door Service**: We pick you up from your doorstep and drop you at your exact destination.

## Popular One Way Routes from Ranchi

Our one-way cab service covers 100+ destinations from Ranchi. Here are the most popular one-way routes:

### Within Jharkhand
- Ranchi to Jamshedpur One Way Cab — 130 km, ₹1,800 onwards
- Ranchi to Dhanbad One Way Cab — 160 km, ₹2,200 onwards
- Ranchi to Bokaro One Way Cab — 110 km, ₹1,600 onwards
- Ranchi to Hazaribagh One Way Cab — 100 km, ₹1,400 onwards
- Ranchi to Deoghar One Way Cab — 250 km, ₹3,500 onwards

### Interstate One Way Cabs
- Ranchi to Patna One Way Cab — 330 km, ₹4,500 onwards
- Ranchi to Kolkata One Way Cab — 400 km, ₹5,800 onwards
- Ranchi to Gaya One Way Cab — 230 km, ₹3,200 onwards
- Ranchi to Varanasi One Way Cab — 420 km, ₹6,000 onwards

## One Way Cab Fare from Ranchi

Our one-way fares are calculated based on the vehicle type and distance. Here's a quick overview:

| Vehicle Type | Per Km Rate | Minimum Fare |
|:---|:---|:---|
| Swift Dzire | ₹11/km | ₹1,000 |
| Toyota Etios | ₹12/km | ₹1,100 |
| Maruti Ertiga | ₹13/km | ₹1,200 |
| Toyota Innova | ₹15/km | ₹1,500 |
| Innova Crysta | ₹16/km | ₹1,800 |

*Note: Toll and state taxes are extra. Driver allowance is included for trips up to 300 km/day.*

## How to Book One Way Cab from Ranchi

1. **Call or WhatsApp**: Reach us at +91 7488341848
2. **Share Details**: Tell us your pickup location, drop location, date, and time
3. **Choose Vehicle**: Select from our wide range of vehicles
4. **Confirm Booking**: We'll confirm your booking with driver details and fare
5. **Enjoy Your Ride**: Sit back and enjoy a comfortable, hassle-free journey

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is the one-way fare really just for one side?**
A: Yes! You pay only for the distance from your pickup to your drop location. No return charges.

**Q: Are toll charges included?**
A: Toll charges and state entry taxes are extra and paid directly at toll booths.

**Q: Can I book a one-way cab for late night travel?**
A: Absolutely! We operate 24/7 including holidays and late nights.

**Q: What if I need to make stops along the way?**
A: You can make reasonable stops during the journey. Just inform us in advance.

**Q: How do I pay for my ride?**
A: We accept cash, UPI (PhonePe, Google Pay), and bank transfers.

faqs.q: What is the cheapest one-way cab from Ranchi?
faqs.a: The cheapest one-way cab from Ranchi starts at ₹11/km in a Swift Dzire sedan. For a short trip like Ranchi to Hazaribagh (100 km), the fare starts at just ₹1,400.

faqs.q: Do I need to pay return fare in one-way cab?
faqs.a: No! With Car Rental Ranchi's one-way cab service, you only pay for the distance you travel. There are no return charges or hidden fees.

faqs.q: Can I book a one-way cab from Ranchi to Kolkata?
faqs.a: Yes! We offer one-way cab service from Ranchi to Kolkata starting at ₹5,800. The journey takes approximately 8-9 hours via NH-33 and NH-19.

faqs.q: Is one-way cab available at Ranchi Airport?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide one-way cab service from Birsa Munda Airport (Ranchi Airport) to any destination. Airport pickup is available 24/7.

faqs.q: How far in advance should I book a one-way cab?
faqs.a: We recommend booking at least 2-4 hours in advance for local routes and 12-24 hours for long-distance interstate routes to ensure vehicle availability.

name: Round Trip Cab
shortDesc: Book round trip cab from Ranchi with dedicated driver. Best rates for return journeys.
metaTitle: Round Trip Cab Service Ranchi | Two Way Taxi Booking
metaDesc: Book round trip cab from Ranchi with professional driver. Best rates for Ranchi to Jamshedpur, Patna, Kolkata & more. Call +91 7488341848.
h1: Round Trip Cab Service from Ranchi — Best Two Way Taxi Rates
content:
Planning a return journey? Book a round trip cab from Ranchi with Car Rental Ranchi and get the best two-way taxi rates with dedicated driver. Our round trip service is perfect for business trips, family visits, pilgrimages, and weekend getaways where you need the cab to wait and bring you back.

## Why Round Trip is Better Value

A round trip cab offers significant advantages over booking two separate one-way cabs:

- **Same Driver, Same Vehicle**: Your driver stays with you throughout the trip, ensuring familiarity and comfort.
- **Flexible Schedule**: Stop wherever you want, spend as much time as needed at your destination.
- **Cost Effective**: Round trip rates are often 15-20% cheaper than booking two separate one-way cabs.
- **No Waiting for Return Cab**: No stress about finding a cab for your return journey.

## Round Trip Cab Fares from Ranchi

| Vehicle | Per Km Rate | Driver Allowance | Base Package |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Swift Dzire | ₹10/km | ₹300/day | 300 km/day |
| Toyota Etios | ₹11/km | ₹300/day | 300 km/day |
| Ertiga | ₹12/km | ₹400/day | 300 km/day |
| Innova | ₹14/km | ₹400/day | 300 km/day |
| Innova Crysta | ₹15/km | ₹400/day | 300 km/day |

## Popular Round Trip Routes

- Ranchi to Jamshedpur Round Trip — ₹3,200 onwards
- Ranchi to Bokaro Round Trip — ₹2,800 onwards
- Ranchi to Deoghar Round Trip — ₹5,500 onwards
- Ranchi to Patna Round Trip — ₹7,500 onwards
- Ranchi to Kolkata Round Trip — ₹10,000 onwards

faqs.q: What is included in round trip cab fare?
faqs.a: Round trip fare includes vehicle charges, driver salary, and fuel. Toll charges, parking, and state taxes are extra.

faqs.q: What is the minimum km limit for round trip?
faqs.a: Our round trip packages have a minimum of 300 km per day. If you travel less, the minimum charge still applies.

faqs.q: Can the driver wait at my destination?
faqs.a: Yes! In a round trip, the driver stays with you and is available throughout your journey. Night charges (₹300-400) apply if the trip extends beyond 10 PM.

faqs.q: How long can I keep the cab for round trip?
faqs.a: You can book for 1-7 days or more. Multi-day trips are charged at per km rates with daily minimum of 300 km.

name: Airport Transfer
shortDesc: Reliable Ranchi Airport (Birsa Munda Airport) pickup & drop service. Pre-scheduled rides.
metaTitle: Ranchi Airport Taxi Service | Birsa Munda Airport Cab Booking
metaDesc: Book reliable Ranchi Airport taxi service. Birsa Munda Airport pickup & drop at best rates. Flight tracking, 24/7 service. Call +91 7488341848.
h1: Ranchi Airport Taxi Service — Birsa Munda Airport Cab Booking
content:
Need a reliable airport taxi in Ranchi? Car Rental Ranchi provides premium airport transfer service at Birsa Munda Airport (IXR). Whether you're arriving or departing, our pre-scheduled airport cabs ensure you never miss a flight or wait for a ride.

## Birsa Munda Airport Transfer Highlights

- **Flight Tracking**: We monitor your flight status and adjust pickup time accordingly
- **Meet & Greet**: Driver waits at the arrival gate with name board
- **24/7 Availability**: Early morning or late night flights — we're always there
- **Fixed Pricing**: No surge pricing, no meters. Fixed rate from airport to your destination
- **60 Min Free Waiting**: Free waiting time of 60 minutes after flight landing

## Airport Cab Fares

| Destination | Distance | Swift Dzire | Innova |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Airport to Ranchi City | 7 km | ₹400 | ₹600 |
| Airport to Doranda | 10 km | ₹500 | ₹700 |
| Airport to Namkum | 12 km | ₹550 | ₹750 |
| Airport to Ratu Road | 8 km | ₹450 | ₹650 |
| Airport to Hatia | 5 km | ₹350 | ₹550 |

faqs.q: How do I book Ranchi Airport taxi?
faqs.a: Call or WhatsApp us at +91 7488341848 with your flight details, and we'll schedule your airport pickup or drop.

faqs.q: Is there free waiting time at the airport?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide 60 minutes of free waiting time from flight landing for airport pickups. Additional waiting is charged at ₹100/hour.

faqs.q: Do you provide airport drop service?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide both airport pickup and airport drop service at Birsa Munda Airport.

faqs.q: Can I book airport cab for outstation drop?
faqs.a: Absolutely! You can book a cab from Ranchi Airport directly to cities like Jamshedpur, Bokaro, Dhanbad, etc.

## Corporate Cab Plans

- **Airport Transfers**: Seamless airport service for visiting clients and executives

- **Dedicated Account Manager**: Single point of contact for all bookings
- **GST Invoice**: Proper billing with GST for tax compliance
- **Corporate Dashboard**: Track trips and manage expenses
- **SLA Commitment**: 99.9% on-time pickup guarantee

faqs.q: Do you provide GST invoices?

faqs.q: What is the minimum corporate plan?
